docket_entries.description: ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 10/11/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY BROWNS, STEVENSON AS TO DEFENDANT HSBC BANK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-30-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT HSBC BANK
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE PLAINTIFF WILL NOT STIPULATE TO JUDGE PRO TEM.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BROWNS, STEVENSON AS TO DEFENDANT HSBC BANK

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-30-2019 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JUL-16-2019 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF STEVENSON BROWN IS PRESENT. DEFENDAND HSBC BANK WAIVES SERVICES. DEFENDANT HSBC BANK IS PRESENT REPRESENTED KORY LAM BRANCH MANAGER. PLAINTIFF WILL NOT STIPULATE TO A JUDGE PRO TEM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELE MCGILL; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
